query: I just received my order but realized I want to exchange it for a different item. How can I do that?
expected_answer: To request an exchange, you can initiate the process by contacting our support team or using the self-service return portal. Please note that exchanges are subject to product availability.

query: What should I do if I want to return a perishable item I purchased last month?
expected_answer: Perishable goods are excluded from our return policy and cannot be returned under any circumstances. Therefore, you won't be able to return the item.

query: I'm considering ordering some items, but I'm unsure about the shipping costs. Can you explain the charges for Standard and Express shipping?
expected_answer: For Standard Shipping, there's a flat fee of ₹99 for orders under ₹999, while orders over ₹999 qualify for free shipping. Express Shipping costs ₹199 on all orders and is free for Premium Gold members.

query: If I place an order after 6:00 PM, when can I expect it to be processed, and how does this differ if I'm a Premium member?
expected_answer: Orders placed after 6:00 PM are processed the next business day. However, Premium members enjoy priority processing, meaning their orders enter the fulfillment queue immediately upon payment confirmation, regardless of the time of order.

query: I just added money to my Acmera Wallet, but how long will it take for the funds to be available for use?
expected_answer: Wallet top-ups are processed instantly, so the funds will be available for use immediately after you add money to your Acmera Wallet.

query: What happens to my Acmera Wallet balance if I don't use my account for a long time?
expected_answer: If your account is inactive for 12 consecutive months, you will receive a notification. After 18 months of inactivity, any remaining wallet balance will be forfeited.

query: Can I earn more rewards if I refer someone as a Premium member?
expected_answer: Yes, as a Premium member, you earn enhanced referral rewards. Premium Silver members receive ₹750 per referral, and Premium Gold members receive ₹1,000 per referral, compared to ₹500 for regular customers.

query: What happens if the person I referred cancels their first order?
expected_answer: If the referred customer's first order is cancelled or returned, the referral reward is revoked, meaning you will not receive the referral credit.

query: Can I control my smart home devices using the Acmera AI Assistant through the mobile app?
expected_answer: Yes, you can control compatible smart home devices like lights, thermostats, cameras, and locks using the Acmera AI Assistant available through the Acmera mobile app.

query: What kind of cloud storage options do I have for my Acmera SmartHome Camera 360, and how can I access live view?
expected_answer: The Acmera SmartHome Camera 360 offers a free tier for live view only, as well as paid plans for recording history. You can access live view through the Acmera app or the web interface without any subscription.
